summary: PR 2431 decompiled and partially improved Yorster stage ground logic in src/melee/gr/gryorster.c, added typed ground track-element fields in src/melee/gr/types.h, and replaced an unknown grYorster_802024F0 prototype in src/melee/gr/gryorster.h with a concrete callback signature. Bot report records grYorster_802024F0 as a new 100% code match and grYorster_8020266C and grYorster_802022A4 as large unmatched-item improvements.

key_files.role: Main decompilation work for Yorster stage functions; adds includes, recovers YorsterParams layout, implements grYorster_802022A4, grYorster_802024F0, and grYorster_8020266C logic, and adjusts grYorster_80202428 field usage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gryorster.c include additions and YorsterParams layout

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup for grYorster_802024F0 and required mp forward declaration.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: adds mp/forward.h and changes grYorster_802024F0 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed signature

key_files.role: GroundVars typing for grYorster_TrackElement, replacing padding and a single x4 field with offset-named fields and object pointers used by Yorster code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grYorster_TrackElement fields x00, x01, x04, x08, x0C, x10, x14, x18, x1C

what_changed.text: Implemented grYorster_802024F0 with a concrete signature using Ground, joint id, CollData, mpLib_GroundEnum, and value parameters.
Expanded grYorster_8020266C from an undecompiled marker into a large loop over nine Yorster track elements with state handling for cases 2, 3, and 4 plus default transition logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removes /// #grYorster_8020266C and adds function body
text_corpus: bot report grYorster_8020266C improves 0.00% to 86.66%

what_changed.text: Implemented grYorster_802022A4 as initialization over nine joints 0xA through 0x12, creating material objects, setting material callbacks, collision callbacks, and starting ground animation.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report grYorster_802022A4 improves 1.03% to 87.45%

what_changed.text: Updated grYorster_TrackElement from mostly padding to offset-named fields including two small state/index bytes, two float accumulators, counters, joint id, HSD_JObj pointer, and HSD_GObj pointer.
Recovered more of local parameter storage by expanding YorsterParams from padding plus x14 into fields x00 through x1C and adding padding after grYt_804D6A20.x0.
Bot report records four new matches: grYorster_802024F0 code, .sdata, .data, and .sbss, plus improvements in grYorster_8020266C, grYorster_802022A4, .rodata, .sdata2, and grYorster_80202428.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired function decompilation with the header signature update for grYorster_802024F0 instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS after the body exposed parameter types.
The PR introduced real struct fields for grYorster_TrackElement and used gp->gv.yorster.elements[i] accesses throughout the recovered code, reducing reliance on raw padding for that ground state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grYorster_802022A4 and grYorster_8020266C element accesses

smart_moves.text: Repeated Yorster element work was expressed as loops over nine entries rather than duplicated blocks, matching the repeated joint-list pattern visible in the diff.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grYorster_802022A4 for loop over joints[9]

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered stage callback body proves its callback signature, update the owning header and include the needed forward declarations in the same focused change.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gryorster.h changes grYorster_802024F0 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void grYorster_802024F0(Ground*, s32, CollData*, s32, mpLib_GroundEnum, f32)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovering typed GroundVars fields can unlock cleaner stage logic and matching progress when multiple functions share the same per-entry state array.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grYorster_TrackElement padding replaced with fields
raw_diff: grYorster_8020266C uses entry fields in state machine
text_corpus: bot report function improvements and new match

decomp_lessons.lesson: For repeated stage-element setup and update code, natural counted loops over the element count are a reviewable source form when the same element fields and joint ids are processed repeatedly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grYorster_802022A4 for (i = 0; i < 9; i++) with joints array

naming_conventions.text: Recovered but semantically uncertain fields are kept as offset-style names such as x00, x01, x04, x08, x0C, x10, x14, x18, and x1C.

Locals use common short role names where evident, including gp for Ground*, gobj for HSD_GObj*, entry for a grYorster_TrackElement pointer, joint for a mapped joint id, pos for Vec3, and frames_left/end_frame for animation timing.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grYorster_8020266C local declarations and body

naming_conventions.text: Address-style function names grYorster_8020xxxx are retained; the PR evidence does not provide semantic names for those functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function names in gryorster.c and gryorster.h

assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The bot report supports grYorster_802024F0 as a 100% new match, but the slice does not include author explanation for why PAD_STACK was required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Uses a switch on coll_data->x34_flags.b1234 environment values, with early returns for unsupported values and fighter/item-specific handling for env 1 versus env 2/3.
Uses a local joints[9] array in grYorster_802022A4 to drive initialization for joint ids 0xA through 0x12.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grYorster_802022A4 joints[9] declaration and loop

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Keeps offset-style struct fields and address-style function names rather than inventing semantic names for uncertain Yorster state.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 records matched code 65.02% (+0.01%, +380 bytes) and matched data 38.57% (+0.02%, +200 bytes). It lists grYorster_802024F0 as 100.00% matched and improvements for grYorster_8020266C, grYorster_802022A4, rodata, sdata2, and grYorster_80202428.
No human review comments or review records are present in the loaded PR slice.
evidence_refs: loaded text_corpus contains PR body and one bot issue comment only

follow_up_queries: grYorster_TrackElement x00 x01 x04 x08 x0C x10 x14 x18 x1C
YorsterParams x00 x04 x08 x0C x10 x14 x18 x1C

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, changed files, counts
text_corpus: empty PR body and one bot report
notes: Strong file and diff evidence is available, including the full raw diff and changed-file metadata.
Verification evidence is limited to the decomp-dev bot report; no local build logs, objdiff output, or author notes are included beyond the bot summary.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so reviewer intent and rationale for specific tactics such as PAD_STACK(8) are not evidenced.
The PR was merged according to metadata, but this intake does not infer that every tactic is a global style precedent.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed stage callback prototypes should replace UNK signatures when the body proves them
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2431 replaced grYorster_802024F0's UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declaration with a concrete void callback signature using Ground*, s32, CollData*, s32, mpLib_GroundEnum, and f32, and added the needed mp forward include.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover shared GroundVars fields before broad stage-state decompilation
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2431 recovered grYorster_TrackElement fields in types.h and then used those fields across grYorster_802022A4, grYorster_80202428, grYorster_802024F0, and grYorster_8020266C, coinciding with one new matched function and two large function improvements in the bot report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: element field uses in gryorster.c

source_update_candidates.title: Yorster stage code and state layout paths
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/gr/gryorster.c contains Yorster stage logic including grYorster_802022A4, grYorster_80202428, grYorster_802024F0, and grYorster_8020266C. src/melee/gr/types.h contains grYorster_TrackElement in ground variable types. src/melee/gr/gryorster.h owns the grYorster function declarations.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-fact update for curator review; grounded by changed files but should be checked against current source ownership before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK tactics should carry explicit rationale even when bot reports a match
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2431 uses PAD_STACK(8) in grYorster_802024F0 and the bot report marks that function as 100% matched, but the slice has no author or reviewer rationale for the padding. This reinforces the existing standard that matching tactics need narrow evidence and should not become general style from a merged diff alone.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate note for curator review only; current standards already cover matching tactics, and the PR slice lacks rationale beyond the bot match.

rejection_notes: Do not infer semantic names for grYorster_TrackElement fields or YorsterParams fields from this slice; the PR kept offset-style names and provides no explanatory body text.
Do not treat PAD_STACK(8) as generally accepted style; the only evidence is its presence in a matched function plus bot report, with no rationale.
Do not infer human reviewer approval details; loaded metadata shows no review comments and no reviews.
Do not claim grYorster_8020266C or grYorster_802022A4 fully matched; the bot report lists them as 86.66% and 87.45% respectively, not 100%.
